Class Character

java.lang.Object
adventure_game.Character
Direct Known Subclasses:
NPC, Player
public abstract class Character extends Object
Abstract class representing a character in the adventure game. This can be a player or a non-player character (NPC). It includes attributes like health, mana, base damage, and name. It also manages conditions like vulnerability, invincibility, and stun. Characters can attack, defend, take turns, and use consumable items.

    Indicates if the character has the Last Laugh condition active.
    protected int

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    attack(Character other)
    Attack another character, dealing damage based on base damage and random modifier.
    void
    castSpell(Character other)
    Casts a spell, taking user input to find out which spell to use (with mana) Health swap switches the health of the other character with this character Health split cuts the others health in half Flip a coin gives a 50-50 chance to double your base damage or the others base damage Last laugh activates the condition that when you die, you automatically deal 5X damage to your opponent.
    void
    coinFlip(Character other)
    flips a coin, 50-50 chance that your characters damage is doubled or the other characters damage is doubled
    void
    decreaseTurnsInvincible()
    Decrease the number of turns the character is invincible by one.
    void
    decreaseTurnsStunned()
    Decrease the number of turns the character is stunned by one.
    void
    decreaseTurnsVulnerable()
    Decrease the number of turns the character is vulnerable by one.
    void
    defend(Character other)
    Defend to reduce incoming damage and set up for next turn.
    int

    int

    Get the current health of this Character

    Get the list of consumable items held by this Character.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • mana

      protected int mana

    • lastLaugh

      protected boolean lastLaugh
      Indicates if the character has the Last Laugh condition active. If true, the character will deal 5X damage to the opponent if they are slain.
      See Also:
      • castSpell(Character)

    • lastItemUsed

      public String lastItemUsed
      The name of the last consumable item used by this character. This is used by items like the Echo Bell to allow reusing the last item.
      See Also:
      • useLastItem(Character)

  • Constructor Details

    • Character

      public Character(String name, int health, int mana, int damage)
      Constructor for Character class.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the character.
      health - The maximum and starting health of the character.
      mana - The maximum and starting mana of the character.
      damage - The base damage the character can deal.

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the character's attributes.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      A formatted string with the character's name, health, mana, and base damage.

    • getItems

      public ArrayList<Consumable> getItems()
      Get the list of consumable items held by this Character.
      Returns:
      the list of consumable items.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Get the name of this Character
      Returns:
      the name of this Character

    • getHealth

      public int getHealth()
      Get the current health of this Character
      Returns:
      the current health of this Character

    • getMaxHealth

      public int getMaxHealth()
      Get the maximum health of this Character
      Returns:
      the maximum health of this Character

    • getMaxMana

      public int getMaxMana()
      Get the maximum mana of this Character
      Returns:
      the maximum mana of this Character

    • getMana

      public int getMana()
      Get the current mana of this Character
      Returns:
      the current mana of this Character

    • getBaseDamage

      public int getBaseDamage()
      Get the base damage of this Character
      Returns:
      the base damage of this Character

    • isAlive

      public boolean isAlive()
      Check if the character is alive (health > 0).
      Returns:
      true if the character's health is greater than 0, false otherwise.

    • getTempDamageBuff

      public double getTempDamageBuff()

    • attack

      public void attack(Character other)
      Attack another character, dealing damage based on base damage and random modifier. Considers conditions like invincibility and vulnerability.
      Parameters:
      other - The character being attacked.

    • defend

      public void defend(Character other)
      Defend to reduce incoming damage and set up for next turn. Has a 75% chance to become invincible for one turn and gain a damage buff for the next attack. Otherwise, becomes vulnerable for one turn.
      Parameters:
      other - The character being defended against.

    • modifyHealth

      public void modifyHealth(int modifier)
      Modify the character's health by a given amount. Ensures that health does not exceed maximum health or drop below zero.
      Parameters:
      modifier - The amount to modify the health by (positive or negative).

    • castSpell

      public void castSpell(Character other)
      Casts a spell, taking user input to find out which spell to use (with mana) Health swap switches the health of the other character with this character Health split cuts the others health in half Flip a coin gives a 50-50 chance to double your base damage or the others base damage Last laugh activates the condition that when you die, you automatically deal 5X damage to your opponent. Allowing for ties.
      Parameters:
      other - the other character, for some condtional spells to be applied to.

    • healthSwap

      public void healthSwap(Character other)
      Swap this characters health with the other characters health
      Parameters:
      other - character to swap health with

    • coinFlip

      public void coinFlip(Character other)
      flips a coin, 50-50 chance that your characters damage is doubled or the other characters damage is doubled
      Parameters:
      other - the other character to potentially buff

    • halfHealth

      public void halfHealth(Character other)
      Halves the health of the other character
      Parameters:
      other - The character whose health will be halved.

    • setAsVulnerable

      public void setAsVulnerable(int numTurns)
      Set the character as vulnerable for a number of turns.
      Parameters:
      numTurns - The number of turns the character will be vulnerable.

    • isVulnerable

      public boolean isVulnerable()
      Check if the character is currently vulnerable.
      Returns:
      true if the character is vulnerable, false otherwise.

    • decreaseTurnsVulnerable

      public void decreaseTurnsVulnerable()
      Decrease the number of turns the character is vulnerable by one. Should be called at the end of each turn.

    • setAsInvincible

      public void setAsInvincible(int numTurns)
      Set the character as invincible for a number of turns.
      Parameters:
      numTurns - The number of turns the character will be invincible.

    • isInvincible

      public boolean isInvincible()
      Check if the character is currently invincible.
      Returns:
      true if the character is invincible, false otherwise.

    • decreaseTurnsInvincible

      public void decreaseTurnsInvincible()
      Decrease the number of turns the character is invincible by one. Should be called at the end of each turn.

    • setAsStunned

      public void setAsStunned(int numTurns)
      Set the character as stunned for a number of turns.
      Parameters:
      numTurns - The number of turns the character will be stunned.

    • isStunned

      public boolean isStunned()
      Check if the character is currently stunned.
      Returns:
      true if the character is stunned, false otherwise.

    • decreaseTurnsStunned

      public void decreaseTurnsStunned()
      Decrease the number of turns the character is stunned by one. Should be called at the end of each turn.

    • setTempDamageBuff

      public void setTempDamageBuff(double buff)
      Set the temporary damage buff. This is a multiplicative factor which will modify the damage for the next attack made by this Character. After the next attack, it will get reset back to 1.0
      Parameters:
      buff - the multiplicative factor for the next attack's damage.

    • obtain

      public void obtain(Consumable item)
      Obtain a consumable item and add it to the character's inventory.
      Parameters:
      item - The consumable item to be added.

    • useItem

      public void useItem(Character owner, Character other)
      Use a consumable item from the character's inventory. Prompts the user to choose which item to use.
      Parameters:
      owner - The character who is using the item.
      other - The other character involved in the action (if applicable).

    • useLastItem

      public void useLastItem(Character owner)
      Reuse the last consumed item. If no item has been used yet, informs the user.
      Parameters:
      owner - The character who is reusing the last item.
      See Also:
      • lastItemUsed
      • obtain(Consumable)

    • hasItems

      public boolean hasItems()
      Check if the character has any items in their inventory.
      Returns:
      true if the character has at least one item, false otherwise.

    • levelUp

      public void levelUp()
